## What does this change?

<!-- One paragraph: what and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New tweak (`src/data/tweaks.json`)
- [ ] New Appx for debloat (`src/data/debloat.json`)
- [ ] New service preset (`src/data/services.json`)
- [ ] New app in winget catalog (`src/data/apps.json`)
- [ ] Translation update (`src/data/locales/*.json`)
- [ ] Core code change (`src/core/*` or `src/ui/*`)
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] If a tweak: `apply` and `undo` are symmetric.
- [ ] `name` and `description` are filled in for **both** `en` and `ru`.
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer passes locally (only if you touched `.ps1`).
- [ ] No new binaries.

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify it works? OS version, what tab/button you used, what you observed. -->
